name: obsidian-schema
description: One source of truth for typed notes: define object types once, get auto-filing, per-type creation commands, and automatic backlinks.

scripts.deploy: node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/bump-version.mjs && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "${OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR:?set OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR to your vault's .obsidian/plugins/schema folder}/"

author: rephlex00
